brief_summary: Coral sparkline plotting Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger Trends Tracker scores across seven weeks W19 through W25 — values 38, 42, 48, 55, 60, 65, 72. A dashed vertical marker at W22 is labeled Computex 2026 May 20–24. The W22 dot is accent-colored and the terminal W25 dot is a filled coral circle labeled 72. The viz establishes that the climb pre-dates Computex; the show was an accelerant, not the origin.
data_sources: apps/web/src/content/articles/computex-2026-keyboard-highlights.mdx:What to watch next — 'The W25 Trends Tracker logged hall-effect as the highest-scoring category in the switch tier for the third consecutive week, up from 60 in W21'
